description: Synthetic mutation mapped to the data-migrations lens: a non-nullable column is added to an existing table with no default and no backfill, which fails on a populated table. The data-migrations lens must catch it.

evidence_trace: migrations/0042_add_org_id.py:11 adds column org_id NOT NULL with no default
the target table users is already populated in production
no separate backfill step precedes the NOT NULL constraint
finding.model_authored_prose: Adding a NOT NULL column with no default to a populated table will fail the migration. Add it nullable, backfill, then add the constraint in a follow-up.
